Awesome Laravel

A curated list of awesome bookmarks, packages, tutorials, videos and other cool resources from the Laravel ecosystem.

Inspired by ziadoz/awesome-phpstars25.4k

Popular Packages

This is a list of well-documented, tested packages that are frequently used in Laravel projects. If you're looking for an exhaustive list of PHP packages, then check out the Package Repositories mentioned above.

Developer Tools
  • Scaffold Interfacestars840 - A Smart CRUD Generator For Laravel
  • IDE Helperstars11.3k - Generates a helper file for IDE auto-completion
  • Laravel 5 Extended Generatorsstars2.4k - Extends built-in file generators
  • Laravel API/Scaffold/CRUD Generatorstars3.1k - Generator for APIs, CRUD scaffolds etc.
  • Laravel Tinxstars436 - Reload your Laravel Tinker session from inside Tinker
  • Laravel API Documentation Generatorstars3k - Automatically generate your API documentation
  • Laravel Packagerstars1.1k - A CLI tool for creating Laravel packages
  • Workbench Export to Migrationsstars878 - Workbench plugin for exporting Models to Laravel migrations
  • Laravel Decomposerstars487 - List all installed packages, their dependencies, app & server details
  • LaRecipestars1.8k - Write gorgeous documentations for your products using Markdown inside your Laravel app.
  • Prequelstars1.2k - A clear and concise database management GUI tweaked for Laravel.
Testing & Debugging
  • Laravel TestTools - Chrome extension to generate Laravel integration tests while using your app
  • Laravel Test Factory Generatorstars877 - Generate Laravel test factories from your existing models
  • Clockworkstars3.5k - Integrates Clockwork Chrome extension for debugging and profiling apps
  • Debug Barstars12.6k - Integrates PHP Debug Bar with Laravel
  • Ignitionstars1.8k - A beautiful error page for Laravel apps
  • Laravel 5 Log Viewerstars2.6k - Log viewer
  • LogViewerstars2k - Provides a log viewer
  • LERNstars432 - Record exceptions into a database and will send you a notification
  • Mail Previewstars871 - Preview sent mail in a web browser or mail client
  • Laravel Tracystars384 - A Laravel Package to integrate Nette Tracy Debugger
  • Laravel Terminalstars688 - run artisan in a web browser
  • Laravel API Testerstars333 - Postman-like tool with Laravel routes
  • Laravel Tailstars592 - The missing tail command
  • Laravel Telescopestars4k - Laravel Telescope is an elegant debug assistant for the Laravel framework
Authentication & Authorization
  • Bouncerstars2.7k - Roles & Permissions
  • Laratruststars1.7k - Roles, Permissions and teams
  • Entruststars6.2k - Role-based Permissions
  • JWT Authstars10k - JSON Web Token authentication for APIs
  • Laravel Permissionstars9.3k - Associate users with roles and permissions
  • Defenderstars410 - Roles & Permissions
  • OAuth2 Server Laravelstars2.4k - OAuth 2.0 authorization server and resource server
  • Socialitestars4.8k - OAuth authentication with Facebook, Google, Twitter etc.
  • Socialite Providers 2.0 - 100+ social authentication providers for Socialite with Lumen support
  • Google2FAstars1.3k - Google Two-Factor Authentication Module
  • Laravel User Verificationstars758 - Handle the user verification flow and validate email
  • Adldap2 Laravelstars830 - LDAP authentication and Active Directory management
  • Doormanstars924 - Limit access to your Laravel applications by using invite codes
  • Laravel Heymanstars695 - Heyman continues where the above role-permission packages left off
Utilities
  • Awes.iostars627 - boilerplate for CRM, SaaS, ERP based on Vue (Nuxt.js), TailwindCSS plus Laravel as a backend.
  • Artisan Viewstars722 - Manage the views in Laravel projects via artisan
  • Bootstrapperstars566 - Set of classes to create Bootstrap 3 markup
  • Captchastars1.9k - An anti-bot image captcha system
  • Chartsstars2.2k - Multi-library chart package to create interactive charts
  • Lavachartsstars588 - Charts and Graphs for PHP Powered by the Google Chart API
  • Eloquent Filterstars1.2k - Filter models and their Relationships
  • Eloquent Sluggablestars3.2k - Create slugs for Eloquent models
  • Eloquent Sortablestars934 - Sortable behaviour for Eloquent models
  • HTMLstars3.6k - HTML and Form Builders for Laravel
  • Multi-tenantstars2.2k - Flexible multi tenancy with secure separation of routes, assets and databases
  • Laravel Form Builderstars1.6k - Form builder inspired by Symfony's form builder
  • Laravel Activitylogstars3.7k - Log activity inside your Laravel app
  • Laravel Auditingstars2.1k - Audit for Eloquent models
  • Laravel Breadcrumbsstars2.4k - Create and manage breadcrumbs
  • Laravel Collection Macrosstars1.1k - A set of handy collection macros
  • Laravel Cookie Consentstars924 - Make your Laravel app comply with the crazy EU cookie law
  • Laravel Datatablesstars3.9k - jQuery DataTables API
  • Laravel GeoIPstars1.8k - Determine the location of website visitors based on their IP addresses
  • Laravel Hashidsstars1.6k - Generate unique, non-sequential ids using Hashids
  • Laravel Impersonatestars1.2k - A package to authenticate as one of your users
  • Laravel Mailboxstars794 - A package to handle incoming emails
  • Laravel Markdownstars1.1k - CommonMark markdown parser
  • Laravel Menustars673 - Html menu generator for Laravel
  • Laravel Talkstars1.4k - Realtime User messaging system
  • Laravel Messengerstars2k - User messaging system
  • Laravel Moderationstars490 - Approve or reject resources like posts, comments, users, etc.
  • Laravel Tagsstars1.1k - Add tags and taggable behaviour
  • Laravel Stats Trackerstars2.5k - Gather information from requests to identify and store
  • Listifystars141 - Add sorting/ordering capabilities to any Eloquent model
  • noCAPTCHAstars316 - Helper for Google's new noCAPTCHA (reCAPTCHA)
  • Purifierstars1.5k - HTML filter
  • Revisionablestars2.2k - Create a revision history for Eloquent models
  • SEOToolsstars2.2k - Helpers for some common SEO techniques
  • Page Cachestars885 - Caches responses as static files on disk for lightning fast page loads
  • Laravel Settingstars685 - Persistent configuration settings that are stored in JSON files
  • Friendshipstars653 - Friendship management system
  • Teamworkstars881 - User to team associations with an invite system
  • Validatingstars914 - Trait for validating Eloquent models
  • VAT Calculatorstars898 - Handle all the hard stuff related to EU MOSS vat regulations
  • Laravel UUIDstars1.7k - Generate a UUID according to the RFC 4122 standard
  • Laravel Installerstars1.6k - Allow users to install your application just by following the setup wizard, like WordPress
  • Laravel Modulesstars3.6k - Easy module management
  • Laravel Phonestars1.6k - Phone number validator and formatter
  • Laravel Banstars601 - Simplify blocking and banning Eloquent models
  • Laravel Proxystars7.1k - Handling sessions when behind load balancers or other intermediaries.
  • Laravel Video Chatstars660 - Video Chat using Socket.IO and WebRTC
  • Widgets for Laravelstars978 - A powerful alternative to view composers.
  • Secure Headersstars383 - Add security related headers to HTTP response
  • Laravel Nova - Nova is a beautifully designed administration panel for Laravel
  • Laravel Lovestars859 - It lets people express how they feel about the content. React on Eloquent models with Likes or Dislikes.
  • stancl/tenancystars1.7k - Automatic tenancy for your Laravel app. No code changes needed.
Media & Document Management
  • Intervention Imagestars11.9k - Image handling library for creating, editing and composing images
  • Laravel ImageUpstars659 - Yet another image manipulation package, adds tons of extra functionality
  • Laravel Glidestars337 - Easily convert images with Glide
  • Laravel MediaLibrarystars4.4k - Associate files with Eloquent models
  • Laravel Snappystars2k - HTML to PDF generator using wkhtmltopdf
  • Laravel DOMPDFstars4.5k - HTML to PDF generator using dompdfstars7.9k
  • Laravel Staplerstars564 - ORM-based file upload manager
  • Laravel Excelstars9.8k - Import and export Excel and CSV files
  • Fast Excelstars1.2k - Fast XLSX, CSV and ODT import and export for Laravel
  • Laravolt Avatarstars1.5k - Plug n play avatar, turn name, email, and any other string into beautiful avatar (or gravatar), effortless.
  • Laravel FFmpegstars840 - This package provides an integration with FFmpeg for Laravel 5.8.
Integration with Javascript
  • Laroutestars774 - Generate Laravel route URLs from JavaScript
  • PHP Vars to JavaScript Transformerstars2.1k - Pass server-side string/array/collection/whatever to JavaScript
  • Javascript Validationstars870 - Use validation rules, messages, FormRequest and validators to validate forms in client-side
  • Laravel Pjaxstars489 - A Pjax middleware
  • Laravel Blade Javascriptstars488 - A Blade directive to export variables to JavaScript
  • Ziggystars2.3k - Use your Laravel named routes in JavaScript
  • LiveWirestars11.2k - A magical front-end framework for Laravel
Databases, ORMs, Migrations & Seeding
  • Backup Managerstars616 - Backup and restore databases from S3, Dropbox, SFTP etc.
  • Laravel Nestedsetstars2.8k - Nested Sets pattern implementation
  • ClosureTablestars396 - Closure table pattern implementation
  • Eloquencestars432 - Extra features for Eloquent models
  • iSeedstars2.1k - Generate a new seed file from an existing database table
  • Laravel OCI8stars645 - Oracle DB driver via OCI8
  • Laravel Backupstars4.5k - Backup your app
  • Laravel Doctrinestars725 - Doctrine 2 ORM implementation
  • Laravel MongoDBstars5.5k - Eloquent model and query builder with support for MongoDB
  • Migrations Generatorstars3.2k - Generate migrations from an existing database
  • Sofa/Eloquencestars1.1k - Extensions for the Eloquent ORM
  • Tenantistars532 - Multi-tenant database schema manager
  • Laravel Repositorystars3.8k - Repositories to abstract the database layer
  • Lada Cachestars441 - A Redis based, fully automated and scalable database cache layer
  • Laravel MySQL Spatial extensionstars601 - easily work with MySQL Spatial Data Types and MySQL Spatial Functions
Search
  • Algolia Searchstars243 - Integrates the Algolia Search API to the Laravel Eloquent ORM
  • Elasticquentstars1.2k - Elasticsearch for Eloquent models
  • Plasticstars494 - Fluently mapping and searching Elasticsearch
  • Laravel Searchstars353 - Unified API for Elasticsearch, Algolia, and ZendSearch
  • SearchIndexstars436 - Store and retrieve objects from Algolia or Elasticsearch
  • Searchablestars1.9k - Trait that adds a simple search function to Eloquent models
  • TNTSearchstars2.4k - A fully featured full text search engine written in PHP
  • TNTSearch driverstars934 - Driver for Laravel Scoutstars1.1k search package based on TNTSearch
  • Laravel-Searchystars527 - Fuzzy search, basic string matching, Levenshtein Distance
APIs
  • ApiGuardstars692 - Allow API authentication with API keys
  • Dingo APIstars9.2k - Multi-purpose toolkit for developing RESTful APIs
  • Laravel CORSstars5.7k - Add CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) headers support
  • Laravel Fractalstars1.7k - Output complex, flexible, AJAX/RESTful data structures with Fractal
  • Laravel GraphQLstars1.6k - Supports Relay, eloquent models, validation and GraphiQL
  • Lighthousestars2.4k - An up and coming GraphQL library for Laravel
  • Laravel Responderstars685 - Build custom API responses with Fractal
Tasks, Commands and Scheduling
  • Dispatcherstars1.1k - Scheduler for Artisan commands
  • Elixirstars1.1k - Node (NPM) package to run Gulp tasks
  • Mixstars4.7k - Fluent API for defining basic webpack build steps

Payments

Monitoring
  • Horizonstars3.3k - Monitor and configure queues with a simple web UI

  • Laravel Uptime Monitorstars843 - A powerful and easy to configure uptime and ssl monitor

  • Laravel Translatorstars276 - Translate Eloquent models into multiple languages

Contributing

Found an awesome package, blog, course or video? Send me a pull request!

Guidelines

  • Please make an individual pull request for each suggestion
  • Make sure the Travis tests pass on your pull request
  • Use the following format for links: [Resource](URL)
  • Want to suggest a package? Read the Contribution Guide
  • New categories or improvements to the existing categorization are welcome
